business_ideas.idea: Restart Milo: a search engine finding where to buy products in nearby stores
Zoom waiting room experience: branded virtual office with video, interactive elements before calls
B2B Spencer's: quirky/fun office merchandise (signs, water bottles, wall art) for company personality
Discord property managers: agency service managing Discord communities, combating spam/scammers
Fit furniture: modular couches and furniture designed to fit through standard doorways
Haters as a service: filter negative feedback about you and drip it as weekly motivation

predictions.text: VaynerMedia-style community manager model will work for crypto/Discord managing at scale
Third-party DMV services and government-mandated document handling are underrated cash-flow businesses
